case_title: RIBEIRO, CLAYTON LUIZ VS SOUZA, PAULO REJANIO DE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY RIBEIRO, CLAYTON LUIZ AS TO DEFENDANT SOUZA, PAULO REJANIO DE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO PAULO DESOUZA RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIBEIRO, CLAYTON LUIZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUZA, PAULO REJANIO DE $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,619.79, PLTF. TO RETURN VEHICLE IN QUESTION TO DEFT UPON SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SOUZA, PAULO REJANIO DE HEARING SET FOR MAR-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF MAR-05-1993, GRANTED
